title: Legacy Apartment Management System - A custom society-owned management platform for day-to-day activities of Legacy Society
description: Collaborated with the core society members of The Legacy Housing Society to understand requirements and pain points of managing a society, and designed and implemented a full-stack web application to streamline and automate the management of day-to-day activities of the society.

title: Compliance Pro - A compliance management platform of contracts for staffing providers across across Europe
description: Took end-to-end ownership of the architectural overhaul of the platform’s component library, which established the core design system, and implemented features that significantly increased development speed for a successful product launch. Additionally, I led the stabilization and performance optimization of V1, increasing system reliability, fostering client trust, and driving higher product adoption across the European staffing market.

title: Golfpost Fantasy - A sports-engagement platform for Golf enthuasist to participate and earn choice-based rewards
description: Led the frontend transformation of Golfpost’s legacy web platform into a high-performance, mobile-first experience with a responsive component library. Collaborated with the team to architect interactive UI prototypes and implement specialized frontend features, ensuring consistent on-time delivery and iterative UX enhancements. These strategic interface improvements directly resulted in a 50% surge in user engagement.

title: MindCleanse - A mental health coaching app for a premiere mental health coach based in Leipzig.
description: Collaborated within a cross-functional team of developers, designers, and product managers to engineer a pixel-perfect frontend for MindCleanse using the Ionic framework on Vue. I took end-to-end ownership of architecting a high-performance, indigenous video calling module, designed for MindCleanse but built with a modular architecture to be reusable across the company’s broader product ecosystem.

title: Traddle.io - Developed a functional and a stable MVP version of Traddle.io
description: Traddle.io was an interactive trading platform for stocks and crypto where users can create communities, live track performances in the European Stock Market while simultaneously discuss within communities and trade together.
